measurement_note: Size is both the array length and the number of snapshots, with a linear number of operations. Sparse version histories process the workload in O(size), while a calibrated full-array copy at every snapshot takes O(size^2).

cases.name: benchmark: 64 snapshots of a length-64 array
benchmark: 256 snapshots of a length-256 array
benchmark: 512 snapshots of a length-512 array
